narrative.headline: Score plateaued at 77.7 for 5 scans. Duplication (0.0%) is where the breakthrough is. 311 wontfix items may also be worth revisiting. (3 review issues — run `desloppify show review --status open`)

actions.description: 8 boilerplate_duplication issues — extract shared boilerplate into reusable helpers or base classes
3 review issues need investigation — run `desloppify show review --status open` to see them
3 stale_wontfix issues — re-evaluate old wontfix decisions — fix, document, or escalate

strategy.hint: Try a different dimension to break the plateau. Review: 3 issue(s) — `desloppify show review --status open`.

primary_action.description: 8 boilerplate_duplication issues — extract shared boilerplate into reusable helpers or base classes

narrative.why_now: Try a different dimension to break the plateau. Review: 3 issue(s) — `desloppify show review --status open`.

risk_flags.message: Strict/lenient gap is 1.7 pts with 311 wontfix issues

agent_notes: Do NOT use `desloppify plan skip` unless the user explicitly asks you to skip an item.
If you cannot fix an item, report it and move to the next one.
For cluster items: if the autofix_hint finds 0 results, drill into individual issues with the primary_command.

clusters.name: security
clusters.description: Fix all mechanical security findings

clusters.name: dead-migration-code
clusters.description: Remove dead code from incomplete BlackLab migration: indexer/hybrid/, root LuceneIndexer, .bak files

clusters.name: interface-contract
clusters.description: Fix QueryExecutor interface gap causing forced downcasts to BlackLabQueryExecutor

clusters.name: debug-logging
clusters.description: Replace all System.out.println with SLF4J logger calls

clusters.name: dead-methods
clusters.description: Remove dead methods, stubs, and copy-paste artifacts

clusters.name: resource-management
clusters.description: Fix per-request index opens that bypass injected executor

clusters.name: test-coverage
clusters.description: Add missing tests for centralized abstractions: ExploreResponseBuilder, MultiSeedExplorer, and wrapHandler error classification contracts

clusters.name: stale-excludes
clusters.description: 5 stale_exclude items verified as valid non-source data directories

clusters.name: structural-large
clusters.description: 2 large files already substantially reduced by extraction

clusters.name: dead-ai-code
clusters.description: Delete AI-generated dead code across GrammarConfigLoader, LogDiceCalculator, WordSketchApiServer, SemanticFieldExplorer. Issues: dead copula infrastructure (822833ee), dead grammar config methods (68d46c6f), dead LogDice scoring methods (06443025), RelationDef class (cd282c18), toLegacyRelationType() (2875ee92), duplicate explore() overloads (bff0195f).

clusters.name: api-coherence
clusters.description: Fix API coherence: BCQL error returns HTTP 200 (16250503); extract duplicate relation switch (90d6143d).

clusters.name: abstraction-cleanup
clusters.description: Remove pure delegation in compareCollocateProfiles, cache collocatePosGroup scan, move serialization out of GrammarConfig, extract shared helpers from SemanticFieldExplorer

clusters.name: convention-fixes
clusters.description: Fix convention issues: replace System.out with logger in BlackLabConllUIndexer, convert RelationsValidationTest to JUnit, fix test naming convention (Test prefix), remove debug prefix from logger.debug() calls, make BlackLabSnippetParser public, standardize wildcard imports

clusters.name: migration-cleanup
clusters.description: Clean up incomplete migration artifacts: .bak files, phantom class references in CLAUDE.md, stale javadoc in QueryResults, orphaned SketchGrammarParser and CQL grammar classes, dead predicate subsystem

clusters.name: design-fixes
clusters.description: Fix design defects: double-close bug, stream-to-logger bug, duplicate logDice pipeline (4x in BlackLabQueryExecutor), duplicate derivePosition methods, double query execution, REPITITION typo, duplicate split methods, dual relation lookup API, inconsistent InvalidQuery handling

clusters.name: test-fixes
clusters.description: Fix test infrastructure: RelationsValidationTest uses main() not @Test; LongIntHashMapTest is in wrong package; integration tests use hardcoded paths; CQL verifier has shallow assertions; dummy test has no assertions

clusters.name: package-org
clusters.description: Structural / documentation issues: utils catch-all package, query package blob (too many classes), phantom /api/grammar/active endpoint, README startup commands incomplete, sketch query params undocumented, GrammarConfigLoader god constructor, oversized executeBcqlQuery, god class API server

clusters.name: bugs-first
clusters.description: Fix genuine correctness bugs: multi-seed pattern substitution missing, SimpleTagger 'am' tagged wrong, remaining parseInt sites

clusters.name: quick-wins
clusters.description: Trivial one-liner fixes: remove unused variable, add @Override, remove dead code, fix pom.xml artifact, remove trivial Javadoc

clusters.name: error-handling
clusters.description: Fix error classification in SketchHandlers.java: narrow handleBcqlQueryPost catch to JSONException and IllegalArgumentException so NPE/state errors become 500 not 400, and add pattern complexity/length guard before passing BCQL to executor

clusters.name: stubs-cleanup
clusters.description: Resolve getCorpusSize stub: either implement using BlackLab API or remove and add to interface as not-implemented

clusters.name: god-class-extraction
clusters.description: Break WordSketchApiServer monolith: extract duplicate handlers, try-with-resources, extract response builder helper

clusters.name: design-structural
clusters.description: Larger structural improvements: package reorganization, SEF constructor injection, QueryExecutor interface cleanup, SnippetParser API consolidation, SimpleTagger lexicon externalization

clusters.name: deprecated-api-cleanup
clusters.description: Complete the extractCollocate* -> extractLemmaAt migration: delete deprecated methods, fix the 'clean' replacement that still calls deprecated, update all callers

clusters.name: sef-dto-extraction
clusters.description: Move SemanticFieldExplorer's 6-7 result DTOs to a new model/ package to decouple the api/ layer from query/ internals

clusters.name: interface-contract-gaps
clusters.description: Align QueryExecutor interface with its implementation: add missing methods, remove dead ExploreOptions.executor field, standardize parameter naming

clusters.name: silent-error-fixes
clusters.description: Replace silent exception swallowing and missing input guards with proper error propagation and NumberFormatException handling

clusters.name: logic-bugs
clusters.description: Fix correctness bugs: no-copy intersection, silent pattern drop, CQL bracket parser, wrong fallback constant, scoreHits overflow, scoreHits default freq

clusters.name: api-server-decomposition
clusters.description: Decompose the 988-line WordSketchApiServer god class: extract shared helpers, eliminate handler duplication, inject dependencies

clusters.name: minor-fixes
clusters.description: Small cosmetic, naming, and API-surface fixes: duplicate Javadoc, log levels, Javadoc accuracy, nullable annotations, server binding

clusters.name: cql-utils-consolidation
clusters.description: Consolidate duplicate CQL bracket-walking logic: substituteHeadword in RelationConfig re-implements what CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens already provides

clusters.name: grammar-config-bugs
clusters.description: Fix contract bugs in GrammarConfigLoader: toJson NPE when configPath is null, and escapeForRegex duplication now consolidated to CqlUtils

clusters.name: snippet-parser-cleanup
clusters.description: Clean up BlackLabSnippetParser: remove or deprecate methods that have canonical replacements, unify near-duplicate lemma extraction

clusters.name: query-executor-cleanup
clusters.description: Fix exception handling, dead code, method naming, interface gaps, and unify duplicate dependency query methods in BlackLabQueryExecutor and QueryExecutor interface

clusters.name: sef-refactor
clusters.description: Fix compare() logic bug and oversize method, remove deprecated String constructor, rename compare(), move multi-seed orchestration from handler into SemanticFieldExplorer

clusters.name: handler-cleanup
clusters.description: Add requireParam helper, shared collocation formatter, fix error status codes, fix JSON key casing, name constants, rename methods and variables in ExplorationHandlers and SketchHandlers

clusters.name: api-contracts
clusters.description: Add typed constructors to ConcordanceResult, create SurfacePatternQuery parameter object, clarify LogDiceCalculator error return semantics

clusters.name: infra-minimal
clusters.description: Add shutdown log, document localhost-only policy, configure CORS origins, upgrade slf4j-simple to logback-classic

clusters.name: tests
clusters.description: Write unit tests for GrammarConfigLoader, HTTP handlers, and BlackLabQueryExecutor; remove or populate empty test directories

clusters.description: Move multi-seed collocate-intersection logic from ExplorationHandlers into SemanticFieldExplorer where it belongs

clusters.description: Remove 2 dead fields from recent refactoring: null indexPath in SemanticFieldExplorer, unused executor in ExplorationHandlers

clusters.description: API surface round 2: unify patterns/relations key, remove nouns alias, fix seed/seeds ambiguity, remove duplicate highlighted field, fix conditional BCQL fields

clusters.description: Fix model encapsulation: ExplorationResult public fields vs ComparisonResult private+getters

clusters.name: elegance-cleanup
clusters.description: Handler improvements: de-duplicate response assembly, move domain logic out of HTTP handlers, fix error consistency

clusters.name: misc-cleanup
clusters.description: Remaining cleanup: deprecated constructors, dead relay methods, duplicate constants, type lies, documentation gaps

clusters.description: Remove LLM-style step-banner debug log separators from SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPattern() and replace with structured log entries

clusters.name: naming-round4
clusters.description: Rename opaque abbreviations and remove redundant fields: cs->collocateSearch in CollocateQueryHelper, remove DiscoveredNoun.sharedCollocateScore (always equals combinedRelevanceScore), rename stale nounsParam variable

clusters.name: cql-substitution-cleanup
clusters.description: Consolidate CQL lemma-into-token substitution logic: remove triplication across three locations and the seam duplication between RelationConfig and PatternSubstitution

clusters.name: refactor-duplication
clusters.description: Remove structural duplication in query execution and handler loops: executor HitGroups-iteration pattern and sketch handler near-duplicate loops, plus posGroupFromConstraint parallel if-else blocks

clusters.name: minor-fixes-2
clusters.description: Quick wins: extract repeated rounding idiom, fix double clamp, fix Javadoc typo, delete empty directory

clusters.name: naming-fixes-3

clusters.name: null-annotations
clusters.description: Replace comment-only @Nullable annotations with real JSR-305/JSpecify annotations and document undocumented null returns

clusters.name: api-limits
clusters.description: Add input size guards to POST endpoints and standardize default result limits across sibling endpoints

clusters.name: contract-fixes
clusters.description: Fix exception contract violations: hidden IOExceptions, undocumented System.exit, exception type mismatch, silent null guards

clusters.name: structural-deferred
clusters.description: Larger structural refactors and T2/T3 judgment calls — defer to a dedicated planning round after quick wins are done

clusters.name: triple-javadoc
clusters.description: Remove duplicate draft Javadoc block before requireNextArg() in Main.java — three issue IDs map to one two-line delete

clusters.name: nullable-annotations
clusters.description: Add @Nullable annotations to return types and parameters that return/accept null without annotation: HttpApiUtils.requireParam(), ExplorationHandlers.resolveRelationConfig() and resolveExploreParams(), CollocateQueryHelper.buildAndRankCollocates() posMap param

clusters.name: naming-minor
clusters.description: Rename two ambiguous identifiers in BlackLabSnippetParser.java: findLabelPosition to findLabelTokenIndex (return value is 1-based token slot), and LEMMA_ATTR_ANY to LEMMA_ATTR_RELAXED (signals case-insensitivity and quote flexibility)

clusters.name: surface-pattern
clusters.description: Refactor BlackLabQueryExecutor.executeSurfacePattern() to use the existing collectFrequenciesFromGroups() helper instead of inlining an identical HitGroups iteration loop — two issue IDs, one refactoring

clusters.name: dead-legacy
clusters.description: Remove or document dead/legacy code: make BlackLabConllUIndexer.indexDirectory() private or add intent Javadoc, audit and remove tag= fallback in RelationConfig.posGroupFromConstraint() if unused, replace array idiom with AtomicReference in Main.java shutdown hook

clusters.name: cors-init
clusters.description: Replace hardcoded initialization constants with configurable values: read CORS_ALLOW_ORIGIN from system property in HttpApiUtils.java, and derive NOUN_CQL_CONSTRAINT and ADJECTIVE_PATTERN from RelationConfig.collocateReversePattern() in SemanticFieldExplorer and CollocateProfileComparator

clusters.name: api-params
clusters.description: Fix semantic-field endpoint parameter inconsistencies in ExplorationHandlers.java: standardize 'seed' to 'seeds' across all three endpoints, and return HTTP 400 when nouns_per is sent to multi-seed explore instead of silently ignoring it

clusters.name: grammar-config-reader
clusters.description: Fix resource ownership violation in GrammarConfigLoader.fromReader(): remove try-with-resources around the Reader parameter so the caller retains lifecycle responsibility

clusters.name: sketch-dedup
clusters.description: Eliminate method-level duplication in SketchHandlers and ExplorationHandlers: extract iterateRelations() in SketchHandlers, extract parseBaseExploreRequest() in ExplorationHandlers, and split ExploreOptions into single-seed vs multi-seed variants to remove the inapplicable nounsPerSeed field

clusters.name: test-gaps
clusters.description: Add missing test coverage for two critical untested classes: write ConlluConverterTest covering MWT-skipping, chunk rotation, and sentence-boundary logic; write BlackLabConllUIndexerTest covering error-continuation callback and close-ordering

clusters.name: model-reorg
clusters.description: Reorganize package boundaries: move RelationType/PosGroup from config/ to model/ (domain vocabulary), stage model/ split moving ExploreOptions to exploration/ and Edge/RelationEdgeType to exploration/, extract GrammarConfig value object from GrammarConfigLoader, and move LongIntHashMap to a collections/ package

clusters.name: error-handling-unification
clusters.description: Unify HTTP error handling: wrapHandler sends 500 for IAE, parseQueryParams silently swallows URL decode failures, resolveExploreParams leaks internal Java messages

clusters.name: null-seed-contract

clusters.description: Normalize API surface: handleSemanticFieldExamples uses 'max' while siblings use 'top'; executeCollocateSearch has reversed param order; optional posMap placed mid-list; boolean trap withStoredHits

clusters.name: hot-path-performance
clusters.description: Fix CollocateQueryHelper.scoreHits hot-path issues: debug log fires per hit, and getTotalFrequency is called once per hit for the same collocate

clusters.name: package-layer-realignment
clusters.description: Move Edge.java and RelationEdgeType.java from exploration/ to model/: these are API/presentation types consumed only by api/, not by any exploration computation
